title: Adhesive Manipulation
wikitext:
[[File:1114853-trp1(2).jpg|right|350px]]

==Summary==
'''Adhesive Manipulation''' is the ability to manipulate and use sticky substances such as glue, webs, or gel. This ability is often used as a means to slow down or restrain opponents, making it extremely difficult, if not impossible for them to make any form of movement. Generally, this ability can be overpowered with high enough [[Lifting Strength]].

Being able to use this ability to climb walls, ect, should be listed as [[Surface Scaling]]

==Users==
*[[Trapster (Marvel Comics)|Trapster]] and [[Spider-Man (Marvel Comics)|Spider-Man]] ([[Marvel Comics]])
*[[Genos (Demon Cyborg)|Genos]] ([[One-Punch Man]])
*[[Batman (Arkham Series)|Batman]] ([[Batman: Arkham]])
*[[Paul Blart]] (Paul Blart Mall Cop)
*[[Minoru Mineta (Grape Juice)|Minoru Mineta]] ([[My Hero Academia]])
*[[Specimen 2]] ([[Spooky's Jump Scare Mansion]])
*[[Goop]] ([[Ben 10 (Classic)|Ben 10]])
